---
title: "Mass-spectrometry-based proteomics: from single cells to clinical applications"
author: 
- Guo
- Steen
- Mann
publication: "Nature, **638**, 901–911 (2025)"
categories: 
  - external-publication
  - medicinal-chemistry
url_source: https://doi.org/10.1038/s41586-025-08584-0
url_preprint: 
journ: "Nature"
issue: 638
page: 901–911
year: 2025
image: ""
pub_number: 
doi: 10.1038/s41586-025-08584-0
---
